package rulecoverage

func NegativePanicOnError() string {
    ruleID := "panic_on_error"
    family := "errors"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "err != nil branches that jump straight to panic or log.Fatal style exits."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
